---
title: 'Load maps'
format: html
---




> Here I want to load the files in: "6. Maps\6.1. Dataset". I want to check that for eahc geographic level we have the code, so we can perform merges.

Libraries:

```{r}
library(here)
source(knitr::purl(here('ignore/libraries.qmd'), output = tempfile(), quiet = TRUE))
```


# 1. Districts

```{r}
districts <- st_read_parquet(here("6. Maps", "6.1. Dataset", "districts.parquet"))
glimpse(districts)
```

# 2. Federal States

```{r}
federal_states <- st_read_parquet(here("6. Maps", "6.1. Dataset", "federalState.parquet"))
glimpse(federal_states)
```

# 3. Municipalities

```{r}
municipalities <- st_read_parquet(here("6. Maps", "6.1. Dataset", "municipalities.parquet"))
glimpse(municipalities)
```

# 4. Postal Codes

```{r}
postal_codes <- st_read_parquet(here("6. Maps", "6.1. Dataset", "postalCodes.parquet"))
glimpse(postal_codes)
```
